actions.script: (() => { const els = [...document.querySelectorAll('*')]; const target = els.find(el => el.children.length === 0 && el.textContent.trim() === '文生图'); if (target) { target.click(); return 'clicked 文生图'; } const link = [...document.querySelectorAll('a,span,div,li')].find(el => el.textContent.trim() === '文生图' && el.offsetParent !== null); if (link) { link.click(); return 'clicked 文生图 via link'; } return '文生图 not found'; })()

(() => { const els = [...document.querySelectorAll('a,span,div,li,p,h1,h2,h3,h4')]; const target = els.find(el => el.textContent.trim() === '活动美陈' && el.offsetParent !== null); if (target) { target.click(); return 'clicked 活动美陈'; } return '活动美陈 not found'; })()

(() => { const setVal = (labels, value) => { const els = [...document.querySelectorAll('*')]; for (const label of labels) { const labelEl = els.find(el => el.textContent.trim() === label && el.offsetParent !== null); if (!labelEl) continue; let input = labelEl.parentElement?.querySelector('input, textarea, select'); if (!input) { input = labelEl.closest('.el-form-item')?.querySelector('input, textarea, select'); } if (!input) { const next = labelEl.nextElementSibling; if (next && (next.tagName === 'INPUT' || next.tagName === 'TEXTAREA' || next.tagName === 'SELECT')) input = next; } if (input) { const nativeSetter = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window[input.tagName === 'TEXTAREA' ? 'HTMLTextAreaElement' : 'HTMLInputElement'], 'value')?.set; if (nativeSetter) nativeSetter.call(input, value); else input.value = value; input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); input.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); return `set ${label}=${value}`; } } return `no input for ${labels.join('/')}`; }; const results = []; results.push(setVal(['活动名称'], '春日咖啡快闪节')); results.push(setVal(['活动主题'], '城市露营打卡季')); results.push(setVal(['补充描述'], '需要入口拱门、中心打卡装置、咖啡摊位和赞助商露出，整体年轻潮酷，适合商场中庭拍照传播。')); return results.join('; '); })()
actions.narration: 填写活动名称、主题和补充描述

actions.script: (() => { const els = [...document.querySelectorAll('*')]; const target = els.find(el => el.textContent.includes('开始生成') && el.offsetParent !== null && (el.tagName === 'BUTTON' || el.tagName === 'SPAN' || el.tagName === 'A' || el.tagName === 'DIV')); if (target) { const btn = target.closest('button') || target; btn.click(); return 'clicked 开始生成'; } return '开始生成 not found'; })()
